prompt: Rode /insights nas sessoes da ultima semana. Quero saber: quais erros se repetiram, quais regras foram violadas, e o que mudar pra melhorar.

assertions.text: Reads session JSONL transcripts (not just CHANGELOG)
Categorizes findings using taxonomy (RULE_VIOLATION, RULE_GAP, etc.)
Each proposal cites specific session evidence
Does NOT auto-apply changes to rules/skills/hooks
